subject_pattern: WAKE-UP CALL: Tonight {TIME_WINDOW} is the REAL Threat - {AREA}
subject_examples: WAKE-UP CALL: Tonight 10 PM - 4 AM is the REAL Threat - Your County, ST
tone: Most urgent. All-caps subject. Repeats that this is the main event. 'DON'T LET THE CURRENT LULL FOOL YOU.'
send_when: Final-hour heads-up. The lull can fool people. Strong storms imminent (1-3 hours).
